title: leontodon crispus subsp. asperrimus
intro: Leontodon crispus subsp. asperrimus, also known as prickly hawk's beard, is a subspecies of the Leontodon crispus plant, a type of dandelion-like flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leontodon crispus subsp. asperrimus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal purposes, although its use should be consulted with a healthcare professional before consumption.
